---
format:
    html:
        embed-resources: true
editor:
    render-on-save: true
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

# Tail Hedging Strategies

## Research


### Where and when do you meet the target prospect?

### Who is the target prospect?

### What is the product?

### Why does the target prospect benefit from the product?



## Copyelements
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(DT)

customer_type <- "investor"

"copyelements.csv" |>
    read_csv() |>
    filter(prospect == customer_type) |>
    select(-prospect) |>
    datatable()
```
